title: HomeCanvas AI turns your 2D floor plan into a 3D home you can walk through.
trace: Upload your plan, set the scale, and trace the walls. Your 3D home rises live as you draw.
canvas3d: Step inside. Orbit it. Walk it in first person. Or take the guided tour. Real light, real shadows.
edit: Make it yours. Swap materials. Twelve style packs. Add furniture. Move the stairs. Delete a pillar? It warns you first.
ai: Or just ask. Add a sofa to the lounge. Preview, approve, undo. All offline.
photo: Then hit Photo Mode. A path tracer refines your room into a near photoreal still. Save it.
audience: For homeowners, architects, interior designers, and developers. Show anyone a home they can feel, before it is built.
outro: Local-first. No uploads. No paid APIs. Want it? Email agrawalparth08@gmail.com.
